_format: verb: cc|cce|ccs; oracle reply fields verbatim (never hand-edited); settings pinned per-record
_source: TyperOracle.scala cc/cce/ccs verbs, scala-cli sigma-state 6.0.2, ORACLE_TREE_VERSION per-record (one oracle spawn per version) ORACLE_NETWORK=testnet; golden_seed.txt typecheck-ACCEPT sources: 172 vectors (30 compile-ACCEPT, 142 compile-REJECT recorded verbatim); corpus: 79 sources fed under cc, 18 compile-ACCEPT kept, 61 compile-REJECT excluded (counted here per the Task-10 brief); compile_probes.txt (Task-11 wave-1 GraphBuilding gate): 92 vectors (47 compile-ACCEPT, 45 compile-REJECT recorded verbatim); M4 Task-1 (gap F2, recon-gap.md Finding 2): `sigmaProp(col1.slice[Long](0, 1).size == 1)` moved from `ccs` to `cce` — the `ccs` capture bound `col1` to a per-element ConcreteCollection SValue (TyperOracle.scala:176), an oracle-harness artifact our EnvValue cannot represent and the real compile API never produces; `cce`'s `col1` is a single LongArrayConstant (TyperOracle.scala:141), API-reachable and now a genuine same-shape probe

vectors.source: { val f = {(x: Int, y: Int) => x + y}; sigmaProp(f(1, 2) == 3) }
{ val f = {(x: Int, y: Int, z: Int) => x + y + z}; sigmaProp(f(1, 2, 3) == 6) }
{ val f = {(x: Int, y: Int) => x + y}; val g = f; sigmaProp(g(1, 2) == 3) }
sigmaProp({(x: Int, y: Int) => x + y}(1, 2) == 3)
{ val h = {(f: Int => Int) => f(10)}; sigmaProp(h({(x: Int) => x + 1}) == 11) }
{ val h = {(f: Int => Int) => 1}; sigmaProp(h({(x: Int) => x}) == 1) }
sigmaProp(Coll(1, 2).fold(0, {(a: Int, b: Int) => a + b}) == 3)
